name: io.github.etanhey/cmuxlayer
title: cmuxLayer
description: Terminal orchestration for AI agents — spawn panes, read screens, coordinate agent lifecycles across Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, and Kiro. 22 MCP tools with ToolAnnotations. Persistent Unix socket (1,423x faster than CLI).

environmentVariables.name: CMUXLAYER_ENABLE_CLAUDE_CHANNELS
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to enable one-way Claude Code channel notifications for agent lifecycle events
